title: Spicy Sprout Delight
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian-inspired dish made with roasted sprouts, crunchy sunflower seeds, and a hint of delight.
instructions: Toss the sprouts with 1 tablespoon of sunflower seeds, salt, chili powder, and Delight on a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the sprouts are tender and lightly browned.
In a separate pan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of sunflower seeds over medium heat.
Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Remove the sprouts from the oven and toss with the sunflower seed and lemon juice mixture.
